summary: 新工人入職+審批 full chain passed on live prod. Worker 60001006 pending membership restored, duplicate-apply blocked (23505), self-approve blocked (0 rows). admin_or_pm_list_applicants now works for PM and 判頭 approver (name+phone returned, the 0610 42702 bug is verified fixed by execution), returns [] for foreman and the worker per design; PM approve PATCH succeeded and the worker immediately gained progress visibility.

improvements.title: 判頭歸屬 missing on worker application — PM cannot tell whose gang the applicant is
improvements.why: Approval card shows only name+phone+company (company was null here). On a multi-sub site a PM approving 工人 needs to know 邊個判頭嘅人 before letting them into the project; today he must phone around, which is exactly the WhatsApp loop the app replaces.

improvements.title: No push to approvers when a new worker applies (INSERT has no trigger)
improvements.why: v5-split/5-trg-membership.sql only fires on UPDATE (approved/rejected push to the worker). Nothing notifies the PM/判頭 that someone is waiting — the applicant stands at the gate until the PM happens to open the Projects page. New-hire day 1 is the worst time for silent queues.

improvements.title: 平安咭 (green card) number/expiry not captured at onboarding
improvements.why: HK law requires every site worker to hold a valid 平安咭. PM approving a stranger from a phone number has no way to check it in-app; sites keep a paper copy instead, defeating the shared audit trail.

improvements.title: PendingApprovalCard fires one applicant RPC per card (N+1)
improvements.why: Projects.tsx calls admin_or_pm_list_applicants once per pending membership even though the RPC already returns ALL applicants for the project. Monday morning with 15 new workers = 15 identical round-trips on site 4G; list should be fetched once per project.
